name: Grzegorz Czajkowski
background: Grzegorz Czajkowski has served as our Executive Vice President, Engineering since April 2024, and previously served as our Senior Vice President, Engineering since 2019. Prior to that, he spent 15 years at Google in various engineering leadership roles.
